subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that, through the effulgent rays of the Sun of divine bounty, thou hast been enabled to attain that which most of His servants are debarred from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله از اشراقات انوار شمس عنایت الهی موفق شدی بر آنچه اکثر عباد از آن ممنوع
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
